UX and taxonomy

Product pages show structure before asking for commitment.

The PLP keeps category, content source, product state, and next action visible for industrial buyers.

Taxonomy

Category tree

Network infrastructure, edge connectivity, computing, and IIoT paths mirror uploaded Moxa navigation.

UX

Decision cues

Badges show environment, content currency, and latest datasheet availability.

Analytics

Intent capture

Filters, comparison, PDP clicks, downloads, and quote starts become trackable events.

Workflow

From PDIM content to page editor approval.

The component design supports content creation, DAM, version control, subscription, and publishing workflow.

1PDIM product data syncs title, taxonomy, specs, and lifecycle state.
2DAM stores product image, drawing, datasheet, and alt text.
3Editor reviews cards and PDP modules with workflow status.
4Analytics confirms search, compare, download, and quote performance.

Apps

Product tools plug into the listing without visual drift.

GenScript-like components make apps feel native: selector, quote, subscription, export, and AI recommendation.

Selector

Guided questions route to product cards.

Compare

Persistent drawer for up to four products.

Subscribe

Lifecycle and datasheet version alerts.

Quote

Distributor and sales routing by region.
